dateline: Johnson Space Center, Houston / Kennedy Space Center — 2017–Present
heroHeadline: Artemis II Crew Shares Personal Reflections on Lunar Mission in NBC Interview
heroSubtitle: Apr 17: Artemis II astronauts discuss the emotional and professional impact of their historic lunar flyby in a new NBC News interview, becoming the first humans to travel to lunar distance since Apollo 17.
footerNote: Data sourced from NASA.gov, OIG Reports, SpaceNews, Ars Technica, Congressional appropriations. Tier 1: NASA/ESA/Official. Tier 2: SpaceNews/Ars Technica/Reuters. Tier 3: Planetary Society/AIAA.
